summary: Tested ReturnSettlementPage editable charge forms, settlement act direct opening, and LeftRailDocuments modal removal. Backend APIs 5/6 passed (1 minor DB issue with damage charge). Frontend code verified - all data-testid elements present. UI loads correctly with financial data shown.

minor.issue: DB integrity error: Duplicate entry '' for key 'PRIMARY' in product_damage_history. Table needs auto-increment ID.

action_items: FIX (LOW): product_damage_history table - ensure id column is AUTO_INCREMENT for manual damage charges
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ ReturnSettlementPage.jsx line 859: generate-settlement-act button opens URL directly via window.open (no modal)
✅ ReturnSettlementPage.jsx line 600: add-late-fee-btn with editable form (conditional: shows when calcLate > 0 && lateTotal === 0)
✅ ReturnSettlementPage.jsx line 619: late-fee-amount input is editable
✅ ReturnSettlementPage.jsx line 675: add-damage-charge-btn with editable form (conditional: shows when damage.total > 0 && no charge made)
✅ ReturnSettlementPage.jsx line 694: damage-charge-amount input is editable
✅ LeftRailDocuments.jsx: NO settlementModal state found - settlement act opens directly
✅ LeftRailDocuments.jsx lines 199-203, 291-295: settlement_act opens via window.open directly

backend_apis.GET /api/finance/order/7396/charges: PASS - Returns damage and late sections

playwright_ui_verification.page_loads: PASS - ReturnSettlementPage shows order OC-7396 with financial data
playwright_ui_verification.settlement_act_button: PASS - Visible as 'Акт взаєморозрахунків' in ДОКУМЕНТИ ТА ДІЇ section
playwright_ui_verification.financial_summary: PASS - Shows Оренда, Прострочка, Застава, Загальний борг

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required data-testid elements verified in code)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26: ReturnSettlementPage has editable late/damage charge forms with conditional visibility (buttons appear only when charges not yet applied). Settlement Act opens directly without modal in both ReturnSettlementPage and LeftRailDocuments. Late fee charges work via API, damage charges fail due to DB schema issue (product_damage_history needs AUTO_INCREMENT id). UI loads successfully showing financial summary with order data.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: product_damage_history table has empty string as PRIMARY KEY entry or table lacks AUTO_INCREMENT on id column
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Modify INSERT query to not specify id column, or ensure table has AUTO_INCREMENT
